criteria.criterion: AC1 — Exp A run recorded: e6_selfconsistency_inputs.jsonl (N≥50, criterion ∈ {G6,E4,T3}, non-empty plan) and e6_selfconsistency.jsonl (3 votes/finding with decision and Pass-2 binary sub-answers) both exist and are consistent.

AC2 — Exp A passes its floor: e6_selfconsistency_agreement.csv and e6_summary.json record Fleiss' κ AND raw agreement; self_consistency.pass == (kappa>=0.6 and raw_agreement>=0.8). Sub-floor result recorded verbatim as R5 blocker.

AC3 — Exp B run recorded: e6_ordershuffle_inputs.jsonl (14 plans with ≥3 sections, exactly 3 distinct permutations each) and e6_ordershuffle.jsonl (verdict per plan×permutation, infra-INDETERMINATE excluded-and-rerun) both exist and are complete.

citation.description: Attestation in ticket by Joe Oakhart/RebarBotNava: Change #787 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/787) MERGED, merge-commit sha 2b1be5198a32960ebf6d3814399c46556c9c9f6a, submitted 2026-07-18 22:44:15 UTC, Verified +1 and LLM-Review +1. n_plans=10/14 with 4 archived tickets excluded (explicitly documented), pass=false==(0.55>=0.6 and 0.70>=0.8) confirmed in e6_summary.json at runs/e6_summary.json:48-50.

criteria.criterion: AC4 [operator-attested] — Exp B passes its floor (or sub-floor recorded as R3 prerequisite failure): e6_ordershuffle_agreement.csv and e6_summary.json record κ AND raw agreement; order_shuffle.pass == (kappa>=0.6 and raw_agreement>=0.8). The n_plans>=14 deviation is documented.

AC5 — Pure agreement/permutation helpers are unit-tested (CI-collectable, no LLM): tests/unit/test_e6_agreement.py asserts fleiss_kappa, raw_agreement, and permute_sections on hand-computed fixtures including perfect-agreement (κ==1.0, raw==1.0), known-κ table, and permute_sections returning 3 distinct orderings with permutation 0 == identity, reproducible under pinned seed, content preserved.

AC6 — Writeup records provenance for R3 and R5 in README.md: criterion filter {G6,E4,T3}, N and counts, corpus_sample.json 14-plan ≥3-section permutable subset, deterministic identity+2-seeded permutation rule, why container-specific ≥20 requirement was dropped, metric definitions + floors (κ≥0.6 AND raw≥0.8), prompts-as-run reference, bounded LLM-spend figures, two gate-input verdicts.
